tasks.title: Initial Project Scaffolding and Manifest V3 Setup
tasks.description: Initialize the repository with the defined folder structure, Vite configuration, and Manifest V3 manifest.json.
tasks.details: Create the root structure: src/background, src/popup, src/settings, src/shared. Configure vite.config.ts to handle multiple entry points (popup, settings, background). Setup manifest.json with permissions: storage, alarms, offscreen, and host permissions for radio-browser.info.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that 'npm run build' generates a valid dist folder that can be loaded into Chrome as an unpacked extension without errors.

subtasks.title: Establish Project Root and Directory Structure
subtasks.description: Create the primary folder hierarchy required for the Chrome extension modules.
subtasks.details: Create the following directory structure: src/background, src/popup, src/settings, src/shared, and src/offscreen. Initialize package.json, tsconfig.json, and tailwind.config.js to align with the React and Tailwind CSS stack.
subtasks.testStrategy: Execute 'ls -R src' to verify all directories exist; run 'tsc --noEmit' to ensure TypeScript configuration is valid.

subtasks.title: Configure Manifest V3 Metadata and Permissions
subtasks.description: Create the manifest.json file defining the extension's capabilities and security requirements.
subtasks.details: Set manifest_version to 3. Configure 'storage', 'alarms', and 'offscreen' permissions. Add 'host_permissions' for 'https://*.radio-browser.info/*'. Define the background service worker, action popup, and options page entries.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate manifest.json against the official Chrome Extension MV3 schema; ensure no warnings appear when loading the manifest in a browser.

subtasks.title: Setup Multi-Entry Vite Configuration
subtasks.description: Configure vite.config.ts to support multiple bundle outputs for the different extension components.
subtasks.details: Configure rollupOptions.input to include src/popup/index.html, src/settings/index.html, src/offscreen/index.html, and src/background/index.ts. Use @crxjs/vite-plugin or manual rollup configuration to handle extension manifest integration.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run 'npm run build' and verify the 'dist' directory contains separate bundles for background, popup, and offscreen components.

subtasks.title: Implement Component Entry Boilerplates
subtasks.description: Create placeholder files for each extension module to confirm script execution.
subtasks.details: Create src/background/index.ts with a simple event listener. Implement minimal React roots in src/popup/index.tsx and src/settings/index.tsx. Create a skeletal HTML document in src/offscreen/index.html.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that 'npm run build' completes successfully and that resulting JS files are referenced correctly in the generated HTML.

subtasks.title: Final Integration and Extension Load Test
subtasks.description: Perform a final build and verify the extension loads correctly in the browser developer mode.
subtasks.details: Generate the production build. Load the 'dist' folder into Chrome via 'Load unpacked'. Check for manifest errors, verify the background service worker starts, and ensure the popup renders a basic UI.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual verification in chrome://extensions; confirm 'Background Page' (Service Worker) status is active and permissions are correctly displayed.

tasks.title: Shared Type Definitions and Zod Schemas
tasks.description: Define TypeScript interfaces and Zod schemas for the core data models: Station, Playlist, Group, and Settings.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/types/*.ts based on Section 3.1 and 3.12. Use Zod for schema validation to ensure data integrity during API calls and import/export. Example: export const StationSchema = z.object({ stationuuid: z.string().uuid(), ... }).
tasks.testStrategy: Run TypeScript compiler (tsc) and unit tests for schema validation against mock Radio Browser API payloads.

subtasks.title: Define Station Schema and TypeScript Interface
subtasks.description: Create the core Zod schema and TypeScript interface for the Station model using the Radio Browser API specification.
subtasks.details: Implement in src/shared/types/station.ts. The schema must include stationuuid, name, url, url_resolved, homepage, favicon, tags, country, language, votes, and bitrate. Use z.infer to export the TypeScript type.
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test using StationSchema.parse() with mock data fetched from the Radio Browser API documentation examples.

subtasks.title: Define Playlist Schema and TypeScript Interface
subtasks.description: Create the Zod schema and TypeScript interface for user-defined playlists to support persistence in chrome.storage.
subtasks.details: Implement in src/shared/types/playlist.ts. Playlists should contain an id (UUID), name, a list of stationUuids (referencing the Station model), a description, and a lastModified timestamp.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validation tests to ensure stationUuids is an array of strings and mandatory fields like name are present.

subtasks.title: Define Group Schema and TypeScript Interface
subtasks.description: Create the Zod schema and TypeScript interface for station groups/tags for organizational purposes.
subtasks.details: Implement in src/shared/types/group.ts. Groups should include an id, name, and an array of stationUuids. This model is distinct from Playlists as it focuses on categorization rather than sequence.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test the schema with empty and populated station lists to verify optionality and array validation.

subtasks.title: Define Settings Schema and TypeScript Interface
subtasks.description: Create the Zod schema and TypeScript interface for application configuration and user preferences.
subtasks.details: Implement in src/shared/types/settings.ts. Include properties for theme (light/dark/system), default search filters, preferred bitrate, and playback auto-start preferences.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify the schema against a default settings object and ensure it handles partial updates correctly via z.partial().

subtasks.title: Implement Central Type Exports and Validation Helpers
subtasks.description: Consolidate all schemas and types into a central entry point and provide shared validation utilities.
subtasks.details: Create src/shared/types/index.ts to export all schemas and inferred types. Implement a generic helper function using Zod's safeParse to facilitate error handling when reading from storage or API.
subtasks.testStrategy: Check that all types are accessible via a single import and the helper function correctly identifies invalid data structures.

tasks.title: Chrome Storage Wrapper with Zod Validation
tasks.description: Create a unified utility for interacting with chrome.storage.local and chrome.storage.session.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/storage/chrome-storage.ts. Create a wrapper that handles serialization, deserialization, and Zod validation. Use local storage for persistent data (playlists, custom stations) and session storage for transient state (current playing station, UI state).
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests using a chrome-extension-mock to verify that set/get operations correctly validate data against schemas.

subtasks.title: Define Zod Schemas for Storage Data
subtasks.description: Define validation schemas for both persistent (local) and transient (session) data structures.
subtasks.details: Create Zod schemas in src/shared/storage/chrome-storage.ts or a sibling file. Define schemas for Playlists, Custom Stations (local storage), and Player Status/UI state (session storage).
subtasks.testStrategy: Unit test schemas with valid and invalid sample data objects to ensure validation logic is correct.

subtasks.title: Implement Generic ChromeStorageWrapper Class
subtasks.description: Develop the base wrapper class that encapsulates chrome.storage API calls.
subtasks.details: Create a class 'ChromeStorageWrapper<T>' that takes a Zod schema in its constructor. It should wrap a 'chrome.storage.StorageArea' (local or session) and provide type-safe accessors.
subtasks.testStrategy: Ensure the class properly interacts with a mocked chrome.storage object during development.

subtasks.title: Integrate Validation in Get and Set Operations
subtasks.description: Implement the core logic for retrieving and storing data with automatic Zod validation.
subtasks.details: Implement 'get(key)' to return validated data or a default value, and 'set(key, value)' to validate data before calling chrome.storage. Serialize complex objects if necessary, though chrome.storage handles basic JSON.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify that 'get' returns the default value or throws if data in storage is corrupted (fails validation).

subtasks.title: Implement Storage Change Listeners
subtasks.description: Add functionality to observe changes in storage with type-safe callbacks.
subtasks.details: Implement an 'onChanged' or 'watch' method in the wrapper. It should use 'chrome.storage.onChanged.addListener', filter for specific keys, and validate new values using the Zod schema before notifying subscribers.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate a chrome storage change event and verify that the subscriber receives the correctly typed and validated data.

subtasks.title: Initialize and Export Storage Instances
subtasks.description: Create and export the singleton instances for local and session storage to be used throughout the app.
subtasks.details: Instantiate 'storage.local' and 'storage.session' wrappers using the previously defined schemas. Export 'storageLocal' and 'storageSession' constants from src/shared/storage/chrome-storage.ts.
subtasks.testStrategy: Comprehensive unit tests using 'chrome-extension-mock' and Vitest to verify end-to-end get/set/watch flows for both storage types.

tasks.title: Radio Browser API Client Implementation
tasks.description: Develop the API client with fallback endpoints, pagination, and rate limiting.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/api/radio-browser.api.ts using fetch. Support the primary and fallback endpoints mentioned in FR-001. Implement a fetch queue or simple delay to respect rate limits. Map API fields to internal Station type.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests using Vitest and MSW (Mock Service Worker) to simulate API responses and fallback scenarios.

tasks.title: Offscreen Document for Audio Playback
tasks.description: Setup the offscreen document required by Manifest V3 to host the HTML5 Audio element.
tasks.details: Create src/offscreen/index.html and index.ts. This document will be managed by the Service Worker. It must include an <audio> element and a script that listens for messages from the background worker to play/pause/adjust volume.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that chrome.offscreen.createDocument can be called from the SW and that the document is reachable via message passing.

tasks.title: Background Audio Engine and Service Worker
tasks.description: Implement the core audio playback logic in the background worker using message passing to the offscreen document.
tasks.details: Implement src/background/audio-engine.ts. Handle chrome.runtime.onMessage for playback control. Manage the lifecycle of the offscreen document. Keep the SW alive using chrome.alarms as per FR-003. Pseudo-code: chrome.alarms.create('keepAlive', { periodInMinutes: 0.33 }).
tasks.testStrategy: Manual test: Initiate audio from a mock popup call and ensure audio persists after closing the popup.

tasks.title: Zustand Store and State Management
tasks.description: Set up stores for player state, stations, and UI state using Zustand with persistence.
tasks.details: Implement src/popup/store/*.ts. Create playerStore for current track and playback status. stationStore for search results and favorites. Synchronize stores across contexts using storage events or manual message sync.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for store actions and selectors. Verify that store updates trigger re-renders in a test React component.

tasks.title: Popup Layout and Navigation Component
tasks.description: Build the main shell of the popup including tabs and the container for the fixed player.
tasks.details: Use React + Tailwind CSS. Implement the 400x600px fixed container. Create the top navigation bar (Browse, Favourites, Playlists; Groups removed in task 21) and a content area that renders the active page.
tasks.testStrategy: Visual verification of layout against design specs (48px top bar, 72px bottom player). Verify tab switching logic.

tasks.title: Virtualized Station List Component
tasks.description: Implement a high-performance station list using react-virtuoso for lazy loading.
tasks.details: Implement src/popup/components/StationList. Render 50 items at a time. Implement the 200px threshold for fetching the next page from the API client. Use a skeleton loader while fetching.
tasks.testStrategy: Performance profiling: ensure smooth scrolling (60fps) when navigating a list of 500+ items.

tasks.title: Station Card and Context Menu
tasks.description: Build the individual station card UI and its interaction menu.
tasks.details: Component should show favicon, name, country, language, and bitrate. Include an 'Add to Favourites' heart and a context menu (using a library like @radix-ui/react-context-menu) for adding to playlists (Add to group removed in task 21). Row click-to-play, copy link, and surface/light theme updates in task 21.
tasks.testStrategy: Snapshot tests for the UI and functional tests for the context menu triggers.

tasks.title: Fixed Bottom Player UI
tasks.description: Implement the persistent player bar with controls and volume slider.
tasks.details: Implement src/popup/components/Player/Player.tsx. Sync with playerStore. Include play/pause, mute, volume range (0-100), and station info tooltip. Add animated equalizer overlay to the favicon when playing.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that volume state changes in the UI are reflected in the storage and that the mute toggle works correctly.

tasks.title: Search Engine with Fuzzy and Regex Support
tasks.description: Implement the search bar with Fuse.js for fuzzy matching and regex validation.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/utils/fuzzy-search.ts and src/popup/hooks/useSearch.ts. Use Fuse.js with threshold 0.4. For Regex mode, use a try-catch block for validation and update UI border if invalid. Debounce input for 300ms.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for search utility: verify 'Name' matches, 'Regex' handles invalid patterns, and debounce prevents excessive API calls.

tasks.title: Language Categorization and Filtering
tasks.description: Implement the language-based browsing system with ISO 639-1 normalization.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/utils/language-mapper.ts. Map variations like 'es-MX' to 'Spanish'. Create a filter UI (sidebar or dropdown) that updates the API query parameters.
tasks.testStrategy: Test mapping function with various language string inputs from the API. Verify that selecting a language updates the station list results.

tasks.title: Playlist Management (CRUD and DnD)
tasks.description: Develop the playlists feature including creation, ordering, and playback.
tasks.details: Implement PlaylistsPage.tsx. Use @dnd-kit for reordering. Implement logic to advance to the next station in the list if the current one fails to load. Store playlist data in chrome.storage.local.
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end test with Playwright: Create a playlist, drag a station to a new position, and verify the order is saved in storage.

tasks.title: Groups Organizational System
tasks.description: Implement user-defined groups for station organization.
tasks.details: Similar to playlists but without playback ordering. Include functionality to assign Heroicons as group icons. Support collapsible/expandable views in the popup UI. Product follow-up: Groups removed in task 21 (playlists-only UX); schema types may remain for legacy backup parse only.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that a station can be added to multiple groups and that group deletions do not delete the underlying station metadata.

tasks.title: Custom Station Modal and Validation
tasks.description: Build the 'Add Station' modal for user-defined stream URLs.
tasks.details: Implement src/popup/components/AddStationModal. Validate stream URLs as HTTP/HTTPS. Assign a 'custom:' prefix to UUIDs as per FR-009. Ensure custom stations appear in search results.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual test: Add a custom stream URL, search for it by name, and verify it plays through the background engine.

tasks.title: Settings Page Development
tasks.description: Create the full-page options UI for extension configuration and management.
tasks.details: Implement src/settings/App.tsx with sidebar navigation. Sections: General, Stations (Table View), Playlists (Groups section removed in task 21). Use the same shared components as the popup. Listen for chrome.storage.onChanged to sync with the popup.
tasks.testStrategy: Open the options page from the popup gear icon. Modify a setting (e.g., theme) and verify it reflects in the popup instantly.

tasks.title: JSON Import and Export with Schema Validation
tasks.description: Implement the portability feature to export/import all user settings and data.
tasks.details: Implement ImportExportSection.tsx. Create a blob for export. For import, use Zod to validate the JSON file. Implement the 'Merge' vs 'Replace' logic with a diff summary UI as per FR-012.
tasks.testStrategy: Export data, clear storage, import the file, and verify all playlists/stations/favourites are restored correctly.

tasks.title: Security Hardening and Input Sanitization
tasks.description: Apply cybersecurity best practices including CSP and XSS prevention.
tasks.details: Implement src/shared/utils/sanitize.ts using a library like DOMPurify or custom logic for API-provided strings (tags, names). Ensure Content Security Policy in manifest.json prohibits unsafe-eval.
tasks.testStrategy: Penetration test: Attempt to inject <script> tags into custom station names and verify they are escaped or removed before rendering.

tasks.title: CI/CD Pipeline and Production Build
tasks.description: Configure GitHub Actions for automated testing, linting, and extension packaging.
tasks.details: Implement .github/workflows/ci.yml and release.yml. Ensure npm audit and CodeQL scans are integrated. Set up a script to zip the dist folder for Chrome Web Store submission.
tasks.testStrategy: Trigger the CI pipeline via a pull request and verify that all linting, type-checking, and tests pass successfully.

tasks.title: Popup UX overhaul (playback, favourites, theme, groups removal)
tasks.description: Product/UX pass from popup_ux_overhaul plan: row play, list navigation, copy link, Add Station preview, search UI + session persistence, branding footer, light theme + Arabic font, tab icons, favourites list, remove Groups, backup legacy handling.
tasks.details: Implemented on develop (e.g. browseNavigation, StationCard/StationList/StationSearchBar/TabNav/TabPanel, PopupHeader, AttributionFooter, FavouritesStationList, SessionUiSchema extensions, popupStorageSync, backup-io groups legacy, removed localGroupsStorage and Groups UI). Fuzzy vs regex retained per plan; Vazirmatn via @fontsource (arabic-400) not Google Fonts CDN.
tasks.testStrategy: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run verify:extension; manual smoke in Chrome light/dark.

subtasks.title: Play on station row click + selected state
subtasks.description: Wire StationCard primary click to play; heart/copy stop propagation; optional current-station highlight.
subtasks.details: browseNavigation.playStationFromList; tests in StationCard.test.tsx.
subtasks.testStrategy: Vitest + snapshot; manual row click plays audio.

subtasks.title: Player prev / next / shuffle from searchResults order
subtasks.description: Navigate by store searchResults index with wrap; shuffle optional.
subtasks.details: browseNavigation.goToAdjacentInSearchResults, goToRandomInSearchResults; controls in Player.tsx.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual list order matches navigation.

subtasks.title: Copy stream URL on hover + clipboard permission
subtasks.description: Copy icon on artwork; url_resolved || url; manifest clipboardWrite if needed.
subtasks.details: StationCard copy control; transient Copied/Failed hint.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manual copy in extension popup.

subtasks.title: Add Station modal preview row (artwork + metadata)
subtasks.description: Match StationCard-style preview using shared StationArtwork.
subtasks.details: StationArtwork.tsx; AddStationModal preview.
subtasks.testStrategy: Visual check modal while typing.

subtasks.title: Search mode: icon toggles in field + fuzzy vs regex tooltips
subtasks.description: Replace dropdown with in-input icons; surface-aware styling; keep both modes per plan.
subtasks.details: StationSearchBar.tsx + useSurface.
subtasks.testStrategy: Toggle modes; verify labels/aria.

subtasks.title: Persist browse query, search mode, language in session UI storage
subtasks.description: Extend SessionUiSchema and popupStorageSync; useUiStore fields; default from settings when empty.
subtasks.details: browseQuery, browseSearchMode, browseLanguageApiValue; hydrate on popup open.
subtasks.testStrategy: Close/reopen popup preserves state.

subtasks.title: Header branding + attribution footer + manifest version
subtasks.description: Logo + Zeng above tabs; footer with 0xdolan, repo link, chrome.runtime.getManifest().version.
subtasks.details: PopupHeader.tsx, AttributionFooter.tsx in App.tsx.
subtasks.testStrategy: Visual + version string correct.

subtasks.title: Light theme polish for browse surfaces
subtasks.description: Surface-aware classes on StationCard, StationList skeleton/footer, StationLanguageFilter, TabPanel buttons.
subtasks.details: useSurface() mirrors TabNav/TabPanel; PlaylistsPage may remain darker (follow-up).
subtasks.testStrategy: Toggle light theme in settings.

subtasks.title: Arabic script: dir auto + Vazirmatn (self-hosted subset)
subtasks.description: Detect Arabic range; zeng-font-arabic; @import font before Tailwind in globals.css.
subtasks.details: shared/utils/arabic-text.ts; @fontsource/vazirmatn arabic-400.
subtasks.testStrategy: Station with Arabic name renders with font.

subtasks.title: Tab nav icons + labels (Browse, Favs, Lists)
subtasks.description: Heroicons-style inline SVGs per tab.
subtasks.details: TabNav.tsx.
subtasks.testStrategy: Visual tab bar.

subtasks.title: Favourites tab: resolve IDs, Virtuoso list, same StationCard UX
subtasks.description: Replace placeholder; sync searchResults for player navigation.
subtasks.details: FavouritesStationList.tsx.
subtasks.testStrategy: Favourite stations play and copy like browse.

subtasks.title: Remove Groups feature + backup/session migration
subtasks.description: Drop Groups UI, storage key, APIs; SessionUi maps legacy activeTab groups→browse; backup import ignores groups.
subtasks.details: Removed GroupsPage, GroupIcon, localGroupsStorage; backup-io legacy line in ImportExportSection.
subtasks.testStrategy: No Groups tab; old backup still parses.

subtasks.title: Quality gate: lint, typecheck, tests, verify:extension, git merge
subtasks.description: Run full checks; commit/merge to develop per project workflow.
subtasks.details: Branch feat/popup-ux-polish merged to develop.
subtasks.testStrategy: CI scripts green locally.

tasks.title: Rebrand Zeng → Tajdîn (Tajdin in repo/code) + player & settings UX
tasks.description: Rename project/workspace and remote to tajdin; user-facing name Tajdîn; fix search-mode list refresh; redesign player and station row actions; settings header + About; playing state shows extension icon.
tasks.details: Naming: use Tajdîn in manifest name/description, popup/options chrome, footers, and About copy. Use ASCII Tajdin for repo URL, folder name, package name, and code identifiers (no î in git or npm). Git remote: git@github.com:0xdolan/tajdin.git. About: link https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mem_and_Zin and include the full 'Why Tajdîn?' narrative (Mem û Zîn, loyalty, radio companion). Audit every 'Zeng' / zeng string: UI, manifest, backup format key, STORAGE_KEYS, tests, CI. Decide whether to migrate chrome.storage keys from zeng.* to tajdin.* (data migration) or keep legacy key prefix for compatibility—document in subtask.
tasks.testStrategy: Grep for Zeng/zeng leftovers; npm run lint, typecheck, test, verify:extension; manual: toggle fuzzy/regex without list flash, player layout, hover actions, About page, playing favicon swap.

subtasks.title: Workspace + Git: folder `tajdin`, remote `git@github.com:0xdolan/tajdin.git`
subtasks.description: Rename local project directory to tajdin; point origin at the new GitHub repo.
subtasks.details: DONE: git remote set-url origin git@github.com:0xdolan/tajdin.git; local folder renamed Documents/zeng → Documents/tajdin; Cursor reopened with `cursor -r …/tajdin`. Push to new remote when GitHub repo is ready.
subtasks.testStrategy: git remote -v; clone fresh from new URL builds.

subtasks.title: Package + manifest + internal identifiers (Tajdin ASCII, Tajdîn display)
subtasks.description: package.json name, manifest name/description/default_title, HTML titles, build output names if any.
subtasks.details: DONE: package.json name `tajdin` + description; manifest name/description/default_title Tajdîn; popup/settings/offscreen HTML titles. Icon filenames unchanged (ASCII paths) until asset rename in later pass.
subtasks.testStrategy: Build loads in Chrome; store listing fields read correctly.

subtasks.title: Storage keys + backup format: zeng → tajdin strategy
subtasks.description: STORAGE_KEYS, session keys, ZENG_BACKUP_FORMAT / file schema strings; migration vs backward compatibility.
subtasks.details: DONE: STORAGE_KEYS → tajdin.*; ensureLegacyStorageMigrated() copies zeng.* → tajdin.* then removes legacy (local + session); runs in SW startBackground() + popup/settings before render. Exports use format tajdin-backup; parse accepts zeng-backup + tajdin-backup. Settings storage listener matches both prefixes during transition. storage-keys.ts keeps migration import light (no full instances graph in popup chunk).
subtasks.testStrategy: Existing profile still works after update; export/import roundtrip.

subtasks.title: Replace residual Zeng/zeng across src, tests, scripts, workflows
subtasks.description: Grep-driven pass: comments, test fixtures, ImportExport copy, PopupHeader, AttributionFooter, backup-io.
subtasks.details: DONE: Message protocol tajdin/player|offscreen|sw|health-check; types Tajdin*; alarm tajdin-keep-alive; CSS tajdin-font-arabic / tajdin-eq-bar; DOM ids tajdin-*; icons renamed tajdin-radio-*.png + manifest; backup TS types TajdinBackup* + LEGACY_ZENG_BACKUP_FORMAT string only; UI Tajdîn + repo github.com/0xdolan/tajdin; README + docs tables. Intentional zeng leftovers: storage migration keys, zeng-backup import literal, settings listener prefix.
subtasks.testStrategy: rg -i zeng; CI green.

subtasks.title: Fix: toggling fuzzy/regex must not refresh entire station list
subtasks.description: Decouple search mode change from StationList effect that replaces results / refetches unnecessarily.
subtasks.details: DONE: `fetchUsesNameFilter` (fuzzy && q) drives `listParams`; main fetch effect deps drop `searchMode`/`regexCorpusMode` so empty-query mode toggles reuse the same API shape (no clear/skeleton). Non-empty query still refetches when switching fuzzy↔regex. Tests: empty toggle single fetch; bbc fuzzy→regex two fetches.
subtasks.testStrategy: Toggle mode: list stays populated without full flash; regex invalid still handled.

subtasks.title: Player layout: metadata above artwork; prev | play | next
subtasks.description: Improve title/subtitle visibility; center play between skip buttons; optional shuffle placement.
subtasks.details: DONE: Two-row layout — title + subtitle (country/lang/tags · state) above control row; prev | play (rounded, h-10) | next | shuffle; spacer; mute + volume. StationArt h-12 + surface-aware frame. PlayerDock min-h 88px + py-2.
subtasks.testStrategy: Visual in light/dark; long station names truncate gracefully.

subtasks.title: StationCard: copy under favourite; fade in/out on row hover
subtasks.description: Vertical stack for heart + copy; CSS transition for opacity (hover + focus-within).
subtasks.details: DONE: Copy removed from favicon overlay; heart + copy stacked in right column; opacity-0 + transition + group-hover/focus-within + pointer:coarse always visible; copy hint under column; min-h-[72px] overflow-visible; test for copy without playback.
subtasks.testStrategy: Hover/focus shows both controls; update snapshots/tests.

subtasks.title: Settings sidebar: logo + Tajdîn title (match popup branding)
subtasks.description: Reuse extension icon + wordmark pattern from popup header.
subtasks.details: DONE: `ExtensionBranding` in `shared/components/` (icon via getURL, Tajdîn + tagline); `PopupHeader` and settings `App` aside use it; options page uses titleTag=h1.
subtasks.testStrategy: Open options tab: branding visible.

subtasks.title: Settings: new About section (logo, version, GitHub, story)
subtasks.description: Nav item About with extension logo, manifest version, repo link, and Mem û Zîn / Tajdîn narrative.
subtasks.details: Link https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mem_and_Zin. Embed full user-provided copy: Why Tajdîn? — Tajdîn in Mem û Zîn as loyalty/companionship vs Mem’s path; extension as dependable radio friend; closing line on daily listening. Scannable headings; optional Radio Browser / issues links.
subtasks.testStrategy: Content renders; links open; version matches manifest.

subtasks.title: Player: when playing, show extension icon instead of station favicon
subtasks.description: Replace artwork in player bar with packaged icon while isPlaying; station favicon when stopped/paused.
subtasks.details: Keep equalizer overlay when playing; same icon path as header (icons/*.png).
subtasks.testStrategy: Play/pause toggles image; no broken img src.

subtasks.title: Popup header/footer: GitHub URL + strings → tajdin repo / Tajdîn
subtasks.description: AttributionFooter, PopupHeader, any 0xdolan/zeng links → 0xdolan/tajdin.
subtasks.details: Align profile vs repo links with product preference.
subtasks.testStrategy: Click-through to correct repo.

subtasks.title: Quality gate and merge
subtasks.description: lint, typecheck, test, verify:extension; branch/commit/merge per workflow.
subtasks.details: feat/tajdin-rebrand or similar; merge to develop.
subtasks.testStrategy: All npm scripts green.
